subject: Implementation: State management (panel.go)
description:
Implement state management for interactive prompts in PanelModel.

Dependencies: Task 6 complete (state machine designed)

Files: internal/tui/claude/panel.go

Implementation:
1. Add state fields to PanelModel (awaitingType, currentPrompt, etc.)
2. Implement state transitions
3. Add timeout timers
4. Add prompt history tracking
5. Add helper methods (IsAwaitingResponse(), ClearPrompt(), etc.)

State fields:
```go
type PanelModel struct {
    // ... existing fields ...
    
    // Interactive prompt state
    awaitingPromptType string // "ask_user_question", "plan_approval", etc.
    currentPrompt      interface{} // Current prompt data
    promptTimeout      *time.Timer
    promptHistory      []PromptRecord // For debugging/logging
}
```

Deliverable:
- State management system
- State transition logic
- Timeout mechanism
- History tracking

Acceptance:
- [ ] State transitions work correctly
- [ ] Timeouts fire and handle gracefully
- [ ] History tracked for all prompts
- [ ] No state leaks between prompts
- [ ] Thread-safe (if needed)
